title: The Two Stances
story: Sensei: "The blade cursor knows two stances. Normal, where you command. Insert, where you write. Master the switch between them."

challenges.intro: Declare yourself ready. Enter the insert stance and add 'I ' at the front.
challenges.hint: Press i to enter insert stance, type the text, then Esc to return.

challenges.intro: A word is missing between the breaths. Insert 'in' at the cursor.
